name: Treat Backdoor Trojans and Virus Events as Offenses
notes: Enable this rule if you wish all events categorized as backdoors, viruses and trojans to create an offenses.
conditions_text: where the Event Category for the event is one of the following Malware.Backdoor Detected, Malware.Trojan Detected, Malware.Virus Detected
TD_list: APPLY Treat Backdoor Trojans and Virus Events as Offenses on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND where the Event Category for the event is one of the following Malware.Backdoor Detected, Malware.Trojan Detected, Malware.Virus Detected
